## L3 Feature: Prompt-Driven Scene Expansion

| requirement_id | domain | parent_id | level | title | summary | category | constraint_strength | cross_cuts | testability | follow_up_question | lifecycle.status | decision_refs | blocker_refs | open_question_refs | certainty | evidence |
|----------------|--------|-----------|-------|-------|---------|----------|---------------------|------------|-------------|--------------------|------------------|---------------|--------------|--------------------|-----------|----------|
| REQ-CG-021 | Content Generation | REQ-CG-011 | L3 | Expand a single-line prompt into a fully annotated scene (dialogue, action, camera, emotion) | Input: "Protagonist confronts rival in rain" → Output: JSON with `scene_id`, `dialogue_lines`, `camera_angle`, `character_emotion`, `weather_effects`. | feature | constraint | [] | testable | — | active | [] | [] | [] | 明确写明 | [00_PRD_v0.3.md]§Modules.L31-L39 |
| REQ-CG-022 | Content Generation | REQ-CG-011 | L3 | Preserve character voice consistency across expanded scenes | Reuses named character voice profiles (e.g., `voice_profile_id: "shonen-hero-v2"`) to constrain dialogue generation. | feature | rule | ['REQ-CG-021'] | testable | — | active | [] | [] | [] | 明确写明 | [00_PRD_v0.3.md]§Modules.L42-L47 |
| REQ-CG-023 | Content Generation | REQ-CG-011 | L3 | Allow manual override of any generated scene field without breaking continuity | User may edit `camera_angle` or `emotion` in UI; system re-infers compatible values for dependent fields (e.g., lighting, sound). | feature | constraint | ['REQ-CG-021', 'REQ-CG-022'] | testable | — | active | [] | [] | [] | 明确写明 | [00_PRD_v0.3.md]§Modules.L51-L57 |

## L4 Rule: Character Identity Binding

| requirement_id | domain | parent_id | level | title | summary | category | constraint_strength | cross_cuts | testability | follow_up_question | lifecycle.status | decision_refs | blocker_refs | open_question_refs | certainty | evidence |

| REQ-CG-032 | Content Generation | REQ-CG-022 | L4 | If `character_id` appears in ≥2 scenes, then `appearance_descriptor` (hair, eyes, outfit) must be identical across all scenes unless explicitly overridden | Enforced at scene merge time; deviation triggers warning + diff view. | rule | constraint | ['REQ-CG-021', 'REQ-CG-022'] | testable | — | active | [] | [] | [] | 明确写明 | [00_PRD_v0.3.md]§Modules.L62-L67 |

| requirement_id | domain | parent_id | level | title | summary | category | constraint_strength | cross_cuts | testability | follow_up_question | lifecycle.status | decision_refs | blocker_refs | open_question_refs | certainty | evidence |

| REQ-CG-041 | Content Generation | REQ-CG-023 | L5 | Rendered video output must contain exactly one audio track, one subtitle track, and one video track in MP4 container | No additional tracks (e.g., alternate audio, metadata-only) permitted. Bitrate and resolution bounded by target platform specs (TikTok, YouTube Shorts). | constraint | constraint | ['REQ-CG-023'] | testable | — | active | [] | [] | [] | 明确写明 | [00_PRD_v0.3.md]§Modules.L258-L262 |
| REQ-CG-042 | Content Generation | REQ-CG-023 | L5 | All generated subtitles must be synchronized to speech within ±150ms RMS error across entire duration | Measured using forced-alignment ground truth from TTS engine logs. | constraint | constraint | ['REQ-CG-023'] | quantifiable | Is RMS tolerance adjustable per project? | active | [] | [] | [] | 明确写明 | [00_PRD_v0.3.md]§Modules.L264-L268 |
